title: cyclosorus simplicifolius
intro: Cyclosorus simplicifolius, also known as the Chinese Leptosorium or Chinese Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus simplicifolius include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed as a herbal remedy, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
